title: FinancialDisclosureFiling
description: An annual financial disclosure report filed by a City public servant under the NYC Annual Disclosure Law (Admin. Code § 12-110). NET-NEW: there is NO public API and NO Open Data twin for the filing itself; today a filer completes and submits their report only inside COIB's login-gated electronic filing website (elected officials' reports are later posted as PDFs, and only on request). This schema serves both the read surface (a filer's own submitted filings and their status) and the write surface (submit / attest an annual disclosure report). Reported financial interests are confidential except for elected officials.

filingId.description: Server-assigned filing/confirmation number. Omit on create; returned on the submitted report.

status.description: Filing lifecycle status. Set by COIB, not the filer.

filerType.description: Which filing category the filer falls under (drives which questions are required).

positionsHeld.description: Positions held by the filer or spouse/domestic partner/unemancipated children, paid or unpaid (Admin. Code § 12-110).

financialInterests.description: Disclosed financial interests. Confidential except for elected officials.

valueRange.description: Disclosed value band (COIB uses ranges, not exact amounts).

attestation.description: The filer's certification that the report is true and complete.

certified.description: Filer attests the report is true and complete.
